results.title: PARLIAMENT–Nearly 55.49 Crore Users Onboarded on UPI as in June 2026
results.description: The Unified Payments Interface (UPI) is a payment system operated by National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), authorised under the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007. The NPCI has informed that there were 55.49 crore users onboarded on UPI platform as in June 2026. NPCI International Payments Ltd. (NIPL) is a wholly owned subsidiary of ...
